_doc: Manifest for the Grimes Hall interior scan layer in grimes-xr.html. Drop scan files into ../scans/ and edit the fields below. The XR viewer reads this file at runtime and gracefully no-ops if `model.path` is null or the file is missing.

model._doc: Primary scan asset. Set `path` to the file you dropped under ../scans/. Format is auto-detected from extension if not specified.
model._alignment_doc: If the scan is in a different unit (e.g., feet → meters) or coordinate system (e.g., Z-up → Y-up), tweak scale + rotation_deg here. Default is Y-up meters.
model._point_cloud_size_doc: Only used for .ply/.pcd. World-units size of each point splat.

lod._doc: Optional per-floor / per-section files for lazy loading. Leave empty if a single model is fine.

rooms._doc_example: One entry per labeled space. Used to populate room-list sidebar and tag hotspots.
rooms.name: Example Room

hotspots._doc_example: Place a clickable marker in 3D space. position is in the scan's coordinate system AFTER alignment is applied. Reference sensor IDs from data/building_data.json or campus_energy.json so the panel can show live values.
hotspots.label: Example sensor

data_refs._doc: Optional pointers — fill any subset. The viewer wires whatever is present.

sensors._doc: Optional inline sensor catalog if you don't want to maintain a separate file. Each key is a sensor_id referenced from hotspots[].data_refs.sensor_id.

_drop_in_workflow: 1. Save your scan file (e.g. grimes-interior.glb) into the ../scans/ folder.
2. Set `model.path` to './scans/grimes-interior.glb' (path is relative to grimes-xr.html).
3. If the scan looks misaligned, tweak `model.scale` / `model.rotation_deg` / `model.position`. The viewer logs the bounding box on load.
4. Add room entries to `rooms[]` so the room-list sidebar populates.
5. Add hotspot entries to `hotspots[]` to place sensor markers — get coordinates by clicking in the scan with the new 'Pick' tool (toggled via the 🎯 button in the topbar).
6. If you have BMO meter or sensor IDs, fill data_refs so the click panel pulls live values.
